## Boundary under review

Describe the control or assumption being reviewed.

## Scope

What is included?

## Exclusions

What is not included?

## Expected invariant

State the invariant that must hold.

```text

```

## Test or evidence path

How can this be validated?

## Risk if violated

Describe impact on confidentiality, integrity, availability, tenant isolation, or execution control.

## Proposed resolution

Document code, config, test, or runbook changes needed.
